description.full: Versatile Backend & AI Systems Engineer with over 4 years of experience building, scaling, and auditing production-ready systems. Expert in architecting cloud-native backends (Python, TypeScript, Rust) and integrating LLM-based solutions with a focus on reliability, security, and observability. Proven track record in refactoring legacy architectures, automating CI/CD pipelines, and executing rigorous AI model auditing to ensure high-performance, scalable software solutions.
description.techList: Python, TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, LLMs

attitude.suffix: I deliver scalable, high-performance solutions that make a real impact.
